steps.title: Punctuate the interruption
steps.content: The phrase recommending evolving binary star systems is not an independent clause; it continues the sentence as a participial phrase. Therefore, however is interrupting one clause and should be set off with commas.

steps.title: Keep one sentence
steps.content: Choice B uses a semicolon before however even though the following phrase is not independent. Choice C creates the same problem after a period. Choice D wrongly places a semicolon after however. The remaining choice uses commas to mark the interruption. The answer is A.
